next_steps: Obtain complete blood count with differential, inflammatory markers (CRP, ESR), and urinalysis
Initiate empiric intravenous antibiotics (e.g., ceftriaxone) for suspected sepsis until blood cultures are negative
Perform serum electrolyte, albumin, and liver function testing
Obtain echocardiogram to assess for coronary artery involvement
Consult pediatric infectious disease and pediatric rheumatology
Consider skin biopsy if diagnosis remains unclear after initial workup
